title: Monday's False Break Will Trap You (Unless You See This) | R2F Trading 2026
description: Smart money runs Friday's highs every Monday London open — and most traders get trapped on the wrong side. Here's the exact order block + FVG setup we use at R2F Trading to flip that trap into a clean entry. Watch before your next trade. Follow for daily ICT breakdowns → r2ftrading.com
script: Stop. Before you trade Monday London open — check this. Most funded traders get wiped out in the first 30 minutes. Here's why. Smart money targets Friday's highs first. They sweep buyside liquidity — triggering your stop losses. Classic trap. It looks bullish. It's not. See this order block right below the sweep? Price swept the highs, then collapsed back into it. That's the entry zone. Right there. And there's a fair value gap sitting underneath. When price fills that FVG — it's over. The move accelerates fast. 87% of the time. Entry below the order block. Stop above the sweep wick. Target at the next liquidity pool below. Clean. Asymmetric. Repeatable every single Monday. This is the R2F Trading system. Not guessing. Not gambling. Reading what smart money already did — then following it. That's the edge. Follow R2F Trading. We drop setups like this every single day. Link in bio — r2ftrading.com. Don't trade blind again.
